impl_iters.note: Main session security hardening after prickly review: credential fail-closed, Origin fail-closed, trusted proxy fail-closed, webhook binding fail-closed, token replay denial.

formal_reviews.note: tsc build and contract test shape passed

prickly_reviews.note: security boundary review: no secret echo in denial/audit responses, browser JWT boundary rejected, webhook non-create responses masked

findings: HIGH empty allowedOrigins allowed malicious Origin
MEDIUM webhook header token syntax not validated
CRITICAL webhook accepted attacker-provided keyHash or missing binding context
MEDIUM malformed 127.* host accepted as loopback
prickly_reviews.resolution: All blocking findings fixed and re-reviewed until No findings.

dod_check.item: MCP security boundary is separate from browser JWT auth and rejects unsafe whitelist modes.
